nodes.name: Get Location from IP
nodes.notes: Free, no auth required. Returns city/region based on the n8n server IP. Works perfectly for local deployments.

nodes.name: Firecrawl Search
nodes.notes: Credential: HTTP Header Auth — Header Name: Authorization, Value: Bearer <FIRECRAWL_KEY>

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'gpt-4o-mini', messages: [{ role: 'system', content: 'You are a data extraction assistant. From the web content below, extract restaurant names, phone numbers, and addresses. Return ONLY a raw JSON object — no markdown, no explanation. Format: {"restaurants": [{"name": "Restaurant Name", "phone": "+1XXXXXXXXXX", "address": "Full address or empty string"}]}. Rules: (1) Only include restaurants with a real, dialable phone number. (2) Normalize all phone numbers to E.164 format (e.g. +12025551234). (3) Skip entries without a valid US phone number. (4) Do not duplicate entries. (5) Prefer restaurant-specific numbers, not directory aggregators.' }, { role: 'user', content: $json.combinedContent }], response_format: { type: 'json_object' }, temperature: 0 }) }}

nodes.name: Extract Phone Numbers
nodes.notes: Credential: HTTP Header Auth — Header Name: Authorization, Value: Bearer <OPENAI_KEY>

nodes.name: Throttle Between Calls
nodes.notes: 2-second gap between calls to avoid hammering ElevenLabs/Twilio. Increase if you see rate limit errors.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ agent_id: $vars.ELEVENLABS_AGENT_ID, to_number: $json.phone, from_number: $vars.TWILIO_FROM_NUMBER, conversation_initiation_client_data: { dynamic_variables: { restaurant_name: $json.name, restaurant_address: $json.address, user_query: $json.originalQuery } } }) }}

nodes.name: ElevenLabs Outbound Call
nodes.notes: Credential: HTTP Header Auth — Header Name: xi-api-key, Value: <ELEVENLABS_KEY>. Variables needed: ELEVENLABS_AGENT_ID, TWILIO_FROM_NUMBER.

nodes.name: Log to Google Sheets
nodes.notes: Set n8n variable GOOGLE_SHEETS_ID to the ID from your sheet URL: /spreadsheets/d/<ID>/edit. Create a sheet tab named 'Calls Log' with matching column headers first.
